title: Optimized+
description: Optimized plus focusses on making your game run a lot smoother with sodium and other optimization mods. it also includes some QoL features including Zoomify and Mini/World Maps.
body:
# Welcome to the Modpack Optimized+!
## created by Satrn

![banner of pack name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06150c9fdbe2b85a452dfd6318be39b73ab55131.png)

#  This Modpack helps with performince using multiple mods, and has a few QoL features.
